meta.title: Davide Messori // Software Technical Leader
meta.description: Software Technical Leader with expertise in .NET, Angular and modern architectures, specialized in industrial WMS, WCS/MFS and SCADA systems.

personal.name: Davide Messori
personal.tagline: Software Technical Leader — .NET & Angular | Industrial Systems

bio: Software Technical Leader with strong expertise in .NET, Angular and modern software architectures, specialized in industrial WMS, WCS/MFS and SCADA systems.
Leading the development of next-generation intralogistics solutions, contributing to architecture design, technical decision-making, software quality and team growth.
Driving refactoring of legacy architecture modules while managing the complexities of coexisting legacy code, delivering reliable and maintainable industrial software.

projects.title: ATLAS Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time analytics dashboard with interactive visualizations. React, D3.js and WebSocket stack for live data streaming.

projects.title: HERMES API Gateway
projects.description: High-performance API gateway with rate limiting, caching and JWT authentication. Microservices architecture.

projects.title: CORTEX CMS
projects.description: Headless content management system with WYSIWYG editor, versioning and GraphQL API.

projects.title: NEXUS CLI
projects.description: CLI tool for project scaffolding with customizable templates and interactive configuration.

timeline.title: Software Technical Leader
timeline.company: System Logistics Spa — Fiorano Modenese, IT
timeline.description: Driving the development of a highly configurable WMS and SCADA web application using Angular, ASP.NET Core and SQL Server. Contributing to microservices backend architecture with REST APIs, RabbitMQ and Docker. Coordinating Agile activities, code reviews and team mentorship.

timeline.title: Software Engineer → Senior Software Engineer
timeline.company: System Logistics Spa — Fiorano Modenese, IT
timeline.description: Development and evolution of industrial WMS and WCS/MFS web applications. Focus on code quality, testing, validation phases (FAT, SAT) and integration with SCADA systems.

timeline.title: Software Developer
timeline.company: Sacmi Tech Spa — Fiorano Modenese, IT
timeline.description: Development and maintenance of industrial software solutions for the ceramic industry, including data collection, supervision and production management systems. On-site technical support and direct collaboration with customers.

timeline.title: Computer Science & Telecommunications
timeline.description: Diploma in Computer Science and Telecommunications. Network design (TCP/IP, VLAN, VPN), Linux/Bash scripting, Python, C, web programming and database design.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.text: Got an interesting project or just want to chat? My inbox is always open.
